content: Obingpihadan zou tu guminavo zou diau om au zou mimang doid isai nopo do montok diau nga izou. Obingpihadan zou tu iziau no do tuhun di mimang zou nopo om au zou mimang atagakan diau.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by LeeSooHa (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I get jealous because I love you and I don't want anybody to have you but me. I get jealous because you're the only person I want and I don't want to lose you
